about.label: About Us
about.heading: A team built
about.subheading: Kinetic started with a simple frustration: too many remodels feel rushed, disconnected, or over-promised. We built our process around the opposite.

features.title: Design before demolition
features.description: We map materials, sequencing, and scope in full before any work begins — no surprises once the crew arrives.

features.title: One point of contact
features.description: You're not chasing down subcontractors or guessing at status — one person owns your project from first call to final walkthrough.

features.title: Craft that outlasts the crew
features.description: We treat every home like it's the one we're going to live in — protected, respected, and finished right.

whyChooseUs.label: Why Choose Us
whyChooseUs.heading: Clarity, not
whyChooseUs.subheading: Remodeling has a reputation for surprise costs and vanishing contractors. We run ours differently — clear numbers up front, one team from start to finish, and a finished space that feels intentional, not improvised.

faq.label: FAQs
faq.heading: Common questions,
faq.subheading: Straightforward answers about our process, pricing, and what it's actually like to work with Kinetic — the questions we hear most, answered before you have to ask.

items.question: How do I get started with a project?
items.answer: It starts with a free consultation — we walk the space, talk through your goals and budget, and define a clear scope before anything goes on paper. From there we move into design and a written estimate, so you know exactly what to expect before work begins.

items.question: How are your estimates put together?
items.answer: Every estimate is delivered in writing after we've finalized materials, scope, and sequencing together — no verbal ballparks, no surprise change orders once the crew is on site.

items.question: How long does a typical remodel take?
items.answer: It depends on scope — a bathroom refresh might take two to three weeks, while a whole-home remodel can run several months. We'll walk you through a realistic timeline during planning, and our five-step process is built to avoid the delays that usually come from decisions made mid-project.

items.question: Will I have one point of contact throughout the project?
items.answer: Yes. One person owns your project from the first call to the final walkthrough — you're never left chasing down subcontractors or guessing who to call with a question.

items.question: How quickly do you respond to inquiries?
items.answer: We aim to respond to every inquiry within 24 hours, usually sooner. You can also reach us directly through the contact section below.

items.question: Do you handle permits and inspections?
items.answer: Yes — permitting and inspections are coordinated as part of our project management, handled alongside the rest of your build so you don't have to manage it separately.

contact.label: Contact Us
contact.heading: Let's begin a
contact.subheading: Tell us about your space, your goals, and your timeline. We will guide you through the next steps with care and intention.

process.label: How We Work
process.heading: From first call
process.subheading: A clear, repeatable process so you always know what's happening, what's next, and what it costs.

steps.title: Discovery & Scope
steps.description: We walk the space with you, listen to what matters, and define a clear scope before any numbers are put on paper.

steps.title: Design & Planning
steps.description: Materials, layout, and sequencing are locked in full before demolition starts — so decisions get made at the drawing board, not on the job site.

steps.title: Build & Execute
steps.description: One crew, one point of contact. We handle scheduling, subcontractors, and daily site communication so you don't have to.

steps.title: Walkthrough & Handoff
steps.description: We don't consider the job done until you've walked every room and signed off. Your home, finished right.

testimonials.label: Client Stories
testimonials.heading: Don't just take
testimonials.subheading: Real results, real homeowners. Every remodel we finish leaves a story — these are a few of them told in the clients' own words.

items.body: A thorough review was done of our home's outdated kitchen — new layout options presented, materials sourced on our behalf, and progress updates at every stage. The stress we expected simply never arrived.
items.author: Margaret Holt

items.body: We've worked with Kinetic on two projects and the experience has been consistent every time. They explain every decision clearly, keep to the timeline, and the finished results speak entirely for themselves.
items.author: Daniel Reeves

items.body: From first consultation to final walkthrough, the team was professional, honest, and genuinely invested in our home. The bathroom renovation exceeded what we'd imagined — we couldn't be more pleased.
items.author: Claire Ashton

items.body: Transparent pricing, no surprise costs, and a crew that treated our home with real care. This is how remodeling should be done — clear from the first call to the last nail.
items.author: Tom & Susan Barker
